title: PeerIdentity
description: Per-profile peer identity record consumed by the M5 multiplayer lobby. Pairs a stable `peerId` (UUID) with the public half of a long-lived Ed25519 keypair generated on first profile launch. The private half lives in `state.profile.peerKeypair` per `docs/architecture/peer-identity.md` and never appears on the wire. Display name is normalized per `display-name-policy.md` and stored on every signaling envelope's signer record. Authoritative doctrine: `docs/architecture/peer-identity.md`, `docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md`.

peerId.description: Lower-case UUID v4 derived from the public key on first mint and persisted across sessions.

publicKey.description: Ed25519 public key, base64url-encoded, 32 raw bytes (43 url-safe chars without padding).

alg.description: Closed enum; only Ed25519 is supported in M5.

createdAt.description: Wall-clock timestamp at first mint. Presentation-only; deterministic gameplay never reads this field.

displayName.description: Best-effort label rendered next to the verified-key icon in the lobby. Validated per `docs/architecture/display-name-policy.md`. Never used for handshake; the public key is authoritative.
